sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28202" key="dou=ras" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοῦρας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a nom. sg. formed from the Homeric pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δούρατα</foreign> (v. sub <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δόρυ</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.97</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
